per_query.nl_prompt: How many films are in each rating category?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", COUNT(*) AS "film_count" FROM "film" LEFT OUTER JOIN "film_category" ON "film"."film_id" = "film_category"."film_id" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

per_query.nl_prompt: Top 5 customers by total number of rentals

mode_a.sql: SELECT "rental"."customer_id", COUNT("rental"."rental_id") AS "total_rentals" FROM "rental" GROUP BY "rental"."customer_id" ORDER BY "total_rentals" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(rental_id) AS total_rentals
FROM rental
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total_rentals DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Total revenue by film category, top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "sales_by_film_category"."category", SUM("sales_by_film_category"."total_sales") AS "total_revenue" FROM "sales_by_film_category" GROUP BY "sales_by_film_category"."category" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT category.name AS category, SUM(payment.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM payment
JOIN rental ON payment.rental_id = rental.rental_id
JOIN inventory ON rental.inventory_id = inventory.inventory_id
JOIN film_category ON inventory.film_id = film_category.film_id
JOIN category ON film_category.category_id = category.category_id
GROUP BY category.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many distinct films does each store have in inventory?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "inventory"."store_id", COUNT(DISTINCT "inventory"."film_id") AS "distinct_films_count" FROM "inventory" LEFT OUTER JOIN "store" ON "inventory"."store_id" = "store"."store_id" GROUP BY "inventory"."store_id"

per_query.nl_prompt: Which actors appear in the most films? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "actor"."actor_id", COUNT("actor"."actor_id") AS "actor_film_count" FROM "actor" LEFT OUTER JOIN "film_actor" ON "actor"."actor_id" = "film_actor"."actor_id" GROUP BY "actor"."actor_id" ORDER BY "actor_film_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name, COUNT(fa.film_id) AS film_count
FROM actor a
JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id
GROUP BY a.actor_id
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Which countries have the most customers? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "country"."country", COUNT("customer"."customer_id") AS "customer_count" FROM "customer" LEFT OUTER JOIN "address" ON "customer"."address_id" = "address"."address_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "city" ON "address"."city_id" = "city"."city_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "country" ON "city"."country_id" = "country"."country_id" GROUP BY "country"."country" ORDER BY "customer_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT c.country, COUNT(cs.customer_id) AS customer_count
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.country_id = ci.country_id
JOIN address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id
JOIN customer cs ON a.address_id = cs.address_id
GROUP BY c.country
ORDER BY customer_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Average rental duration in days by film rating

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", AVG("film"."rental_duration") AS "average_rental_duration" FROM "film" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

mode_b.error:
EXPLAIN failed: column i.rental_duration does not exist
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "f.rental_duration".
mode_b.sql:
SELECT f.rating, AVG(i.rental_duration) AS average_rental_duration
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
GROUP BY f.rating;

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the original language of each film?
Show customer full names (first and last name combined)

mode_b.sql: SELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name FROM customer;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many rentals have not been returned yet?

mode_a.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total_rentals_not_returned" FROM "rental" WHERE "rental"."return_date" IS NULL

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the total revenue from all payments?

mode_b.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM payment;

per_query.nl_prompt: List customers from the United States

mode_b.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, a.address, ci.city, co.country
FROM customer c
JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id
JOIN country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE co.country = 'United States';
